title: Uruguayan Peanut Biscuit Bake
description: A unique dessert recipe combining Uruguayan flavors with peanut and biscuit ingredients.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the biscuit pieces and melted chocolate.
Add the chopped peanuts, granulated sugar, eggs, vanilla extract, and softened butter to the bowl.
Mix well until all the ingredients are fully incorporated.
Pour the mixture into a baking dish and bake for 25-30 minutes.
Check for doneness by inserting a toothpick into the center, it should come out clean.
Remove the bake from the oven and let it cool completely before serving.
Serve warm or at room temperature, garnished with additional peanuts if desired.
